title: LITENDIAN Warning on ascending array declaration
body:
---


Author Name: **Wai Sum Mong**
Original Redmine Issue: 614 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2013-02-05
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

I start getting 'LITENDIAN' warning on ascending array declaration with verilator 3.845, but the array element is big bit endian. It doesn't seem to be consistent with the documented definition of the warning. The following shows an example. Thanks!


     module tb;
         reg	[7:0]	mem[0:15];
     endmodule

%Warning-LITENDIAN: mem.v:2: Little bit endian vector: MSB < LSB of bit range: 0:15

%Warning-LITENDIAN: Use "/* verilator lint_off LITENDIAN */" and lint_on 
around source to disable this message.
